digest_entry.summary: Heads up — Noah's 6-month checkup (Tue Jun 23, 10:15 AM) overlaps your work meeting at 10:00 AM.
digest_entry.detail: You may want to reschedule one of them. The checkup and the work meeting both start in the same window on Tuesday Jun 23.
suggested_actions: Move the checkup to a different slot
Review your calendar and resolve manually

parsed.rationale: No outbound communication is needed — this is an internal digest flag surfacing a calendar conflict between Noah's checkup and a work meeting for the parent to resolve.
